title: Smelting Plus
description: Smelting Plus is a simple data pack for Minecraft Java that allows for better recycling when you melt your found or crafted items. Instead of only receiving a gold or iron nugget, you will now receive an ingot.
body:
## Smelting Plus v1.1.3 – Full Recycling for Copper Age & More!  
(1.21.9 – 1.21.10 | Fabric • Forge • Quilt • Data Pack)

### Tired of getting just nuggets when smelting tools and armor?  

Smelting Plus fixes that: every item returns 1 full ingot (iron, gold, copper, diamond & netherite) instead of nuggets! Perfect for late-game recycling and modpacks.

### Full Copper Age 1.21.9+ support!  
- Copper Pickaxe, Axe, Hoe, Sword  
- Full Copper Armor Set + Horse Armor  
- Copper Door, Trapdoor, Grate, Bulb, Lightning Rod  
- Spyglass (2 ingots → 1 ingot back)  
- All iron/gold/diamond/netherite tools & armor  
- Buckets, rails, hoppers, cauldrons, shears, etc.

![copper update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xDvYGZrH/images/8df23b2ec0e5194b087ac96ce82a04e7ff762c93.png)

### Features 
- 1 ingot return on everything
- Works in regular & blast furnaces  


The list of items you can smelt.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xDvYGZrH/images/2d91852a6bf08b77252b2d02f652d1e12a81ffb5.webp)

- iron pickaxe, iron axe, iron hoe, iron sword, iron helmet, iron chestplate, iron leggings, iron boots, iron horse armor.
- golden pickaxe, golden axe, golden hoe, golden sword, golden helmet, golden chestplate, golden leggings, golden boots, golden horse armor.
- diamond pickaxe, diamond axe, diamond hoe, diamond sword, diamond helmet, diamond chestplate, diamond leggings, diamond boots.
- netherite pickaxe, netherite axe, netherite hoe, netherite sword, netherite helmet, netherite chestplate, netherite leggings, netherite boots.
- bucket, hopper, and shears

The list of items you will get.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xDvYGZrH/images/555130797d9d33b09ddf328e788c4071df1795fb.webp)

- iron ingot
- golden ingot
- copper ingot
- diamond
- netherite ingot
